_comment: Content presets for the Reference Report — the single source of truth for the report's preset feature; see Partner-Report/presets.json for the model. The NeoIPC-Reporting backend reads this at runtime for GET /reference-report/presets (System.Text.Json; no parser dependency); the app applies the chosen preset client-side as -P render params. Plain preset DATA, not a Quarto profile. Each preset under 'presets' lists only the params that differ from the QMD defaults; 'default' is the empty override set.
